EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to access the system on host {nas_ip}
A user failed to access the system on host {nas_ip}
The user {subject.account.name} accessed the system on host {nas_ip}
A user failed to access the system on host {nas_fqdn}
The user {subject.account.name} accessed the system on host {nas_fqdn}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to access the system on host {nas_fqdn}
